title: nephrodium coruscum
intro: Nephrodium coruscum, also known as the Glittering Maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, Nephrodium coruscum has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium coruscum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
